'''Tolad Dor''' was an [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] gangster active in the [[Nilg system/Legends|Nilg system]].

==Biography==

At some point of its career, Dor made a contract with [[Ostan Atur]], a [[Lowen]] [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] from [[Low'n]], with whom the Ithorian worked for nearly two years. In addition to disabling equipment, breaching security and rigging [[Thermal detonator/Legends|detonators]], she crippled many [[Starship/Legends|starships]], allowing Dor's minions to collect goods from stores and sell them on the invisible market. She was an invaluable part of Dor's growing syndicate until she left.<ref name="WBC" />
